mri_cash.label: Cash-price MRI (facility fee)
mri_cash.source: Healthcare price-transparency studies / vertical-analysis-2026 (verify Turquoise Health / Fair Health when live)
mri_cash.notes: Up to ~10x metro spread possible; red-flag if >2.5x mid or refusal to state cash price.

red_flag.description: Red-flag if quote >2.5x metro median cash mid, or refusal to state cash price (price opacity).

negotiation_levers: Require full itemization of equipment, labor, refrigerant, permit, and haul-away
Cite only real competing written bids from get_competing_bids (never invent)
Push back on padded or vague fees until line items are clear
Disclose AI/assistant role honestly if asked whether you are a robot
Close every call with a structured outcome: itemized_quote | callback_commitment | documented_decline

glossary.tonnage: Cooling capacity; 1 ton ≈ 12,000 BTU/hr. Typical homes use 2–5 ton units.
glossary.SEER2: Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio (updated standard) for AC efficiency.
glossary.callout: Trip/diagnostic fee charged for a tech visit before repair.
glossary.line_set: Copper refrigerant tubing connecting outdoor and indoor units.
glossary.ductwork: Supply/return air paths; leaks reduce efficiency and comfort.
glossary.R-410A: Common residential refrigerant; recovery and recharge are regulated.

ui.confirm_button: Looks right — get me cash quotes
